topPlaces.name: Nandavaram
topPlaces.description: Nandavaram is a village in the Banaganapalle mandal, Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Nandavaram village is famous for the temple of Goddess Sri Ramalinga Sowdeswari Amman.

topPlaces.name: Banaganapalli
topPlaces.description: Banaganapalli is a town in the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It lies in Nandyal district, 38 km west of the city of Nandyal.

topPlaces.name: Banganapalle State
topPlaces.description: Banganapalle State was one of the princely states of India during the period of the British Raj. The state was founded in 1665 and had its capital in Banganapalle.

items.note: Nandavaram is a village in the Banaganapalle mandal, Nandyal district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Nandavaram village is famous for the temple of Goddess Sri Ramalinga Sowdeswari Amman.
Banaganapalli is a town in the state of Andhra Pradesh, India. It lies in Nandyal district, 38 km west of the city of Nandyal.
Banganapalle State was one of the princely states of India during the period of the British Raj. The state was founded in 1665 and had its capital in Banganapalle.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (225 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram?
faq.a: Stays in Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chowdeshwari Temple at Nandavaram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nandavaram, Banaganapalli, Banganapalle State.
